message.content:
Explore the design system and UX documentation in the MMS-MFC project.

Focus on:
1. Find and read any design specs: look in `docs/`, `docs/design/`, or similar
2. Read `docs/DESIGN_SPEC.md` if it exists
3. Read `docs/MMS_STYLE_GUIDE.md` if it exists
4. Examine current component styling in `apps/web/src/components/` - look at 2-3 components
5. Check `apps/web/tailwind.config.ts` for current theme configuration
6. Check `apps/web/src/app/globals.css` for global styles

Report:
- Current design system state (colors, typography, spacing)
- Any existing design documentation
- Gap between current implementation and "Enterprise Dark Mode" look
- Specific areas needing visual improvement

1вҶ’# UX Specification: Infinite Canvas for Railway Maintenance Planning 2вҶ’ 3вҶ’## 1. Vision 4вҶ’ 5вҶ’**"Single Pane of Glass"** вҖ” A continuous, zoomable timeline that unifies 12-year strategic planning down to daily operations without page reloads or tab navigation. 6вҶ’ 7вҶ’**Core Metaphor:** Google Earth for time. Pan through years, zoom into days. Data transforms semantically at each level. 8вҶ’ 9вҶ’--- 10вҶ’ 11вҶ’## 2. Architecture Overview 12вҶ’ 13вҶ’``` 14вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 15вҶ’в”Ӯ React Application в”Ӯ 16вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 17вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ 18вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Viewport в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @use-gesture в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @mms/toolkit в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 19вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ State в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө Input Handler в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө State Machine в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 20вҶ’в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ 21вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 22вҶ’в”Ӯ LOD Decision Layer в”Ӯ 23вҶ’в”Ӯ zoom < 0.5 вҶ’ MACRO в”Ӯ 0.5-2.0 вҶ’ MESO в”Ӯ > 2.0 вҶ’ MICRO в”Ӯ 24вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 25вҶ’в”Ӯ HeatmapLayer в”Ӯ ScatterplotLayer в”Ӯ PolygonLayer + HTML в”Ӯ 26вҶ’в”Ӯ (aggregated) в”Ӯ (instanced) в”Ӯ (detailed cards) в”Ӯ 27вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 28вҶ’в”Ӯ RBush Spatial Index (60,000+ tasks) в”Ӯ 29вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 30вҶ’в”Ӯ deck.gl OrthographicView + WebGL2 Renderer в”Ӯ 31вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 32вҶ’``` 33вҶ’ 34вҶ’### Tech Stack 35вҶ’ 36вҶ’| Layer | Technology | Purpose | 37вҶ’|-----------|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------| 38вҶ’| Rendering | **deck.gl** + OrthographicView | WebGL2 canvas with GPU instancing | 39вҶ’| Input | **@use-gesture/react** | Cross-platform pan/zoom/pinch | 40вҶ’| Spatial | **RBush** | O(log n) viewport culling | 41вҶ’| State | **@mms/toolkit** | Reactive state machine | 42вҶ’| UI | **BlueprintJS 6** | Navbar, cards, controls | 43вҶ’ 44вҶ’--- 45вҶ’ 46вҶ’## 3. Coordinate System 47вҶ’ 48вҶ’The canvas uses a 2D orthographic coordinate system: 49вҶ’ 50вҶ’| Axis | Represents | Unit | Example | 51вҶ’|-------|-------------|------------------|---------------------| 52вҶ’| **X** | Time | Days since epoch | Day 0 = Jan 1, 2024 | 53вҶ’| **Y** | Train index | Row number | Train 0-49 | 54вҶ’ 55вҶ’```typescript 56вҶ’// World coordinates 57вҶ’const PX_PER_DAY = 10; // 1 day = 10 pixels 58вҶ’const PX_PER_TRAIN = 24; // 1 train row = 24 pixels 59вҶ’ 60вҶ’// Convert screen to world 61вҶ’function screenToWorld(screenX: number, screenY: number, viewport: Viewport) { 62вҶ’ return { 63вҶ’ day: (screenX - viewport.x) / (PX_PER_DAY * viewport.zoom), 64вҶ’ trainIndex: (screenY - viewport.y) / (PX_PER_TRAIN * viewport.zoom) 65вҶ’ }; 66вҶ’} 67вҶ’``` 68вҶ’ 69вҶ’--- 70вҶ’ 71вҶ’## 4. Semantic Zoom (LOD Layers) 72вҶ’ 73вҶ’### 4.1 Level of Detail Thresholds 74вҶ’ 75вҶ’| LOD | Zoom Range | Time Visible | Visualization | 76вҶ’|-----------|-------------|--------------|-------------------------------| 77вҶ’| **MACRO** | < 0.5x | 10-20 years | Aggregated heatmap | 78вҶ’| **MESO** | 0.5x - 2.0x | 2-5 years | Task blocks (DNA pattern) | 79вҶ’| **MICRO** | > 2.0x | 4-8 weeks | Detailed cards + dependencies | 80вҶ’ 81вҶ’### 4.2 Layer Implementation 82вҶ’ 83вҶ’```typescript 84вҶ’// deck.gl CompositeLayer with LOD switching 85вҶ’class MaintenanceLayer extends CompositeLayer { 86вҶ’ renderLayers() { 87вҶ’ const { zoom } = this.context.viewport; 88вҶ’ 89вҶ’ return [ 90вҶ’ new HeatmapLayer({ 91вҶ’ id: 'macro', 92вҶ’ visible: zoom < 0.5, 93вҶ’ data: this.props.aggregatedData, 94вҶ’ getPosition: d => [d.dayCenter, d.trainCenter], 95вҶ’ getWeight: d => d.taskCount, 96вҶ’ colorRange: HEATMAP_COLORS // Yellow вҶ’ Orange вҶ’ Red 97вҶ’ }), 98вҶ’ 99вҶ’ new ScatterplotLayer({ 100вҶ’ id: 'meso', 101вҶ’ visible: zoom >= 0.5 && zoom < 2.0, 102вҶ’ data: this.props.tasks, 103вҶ’ getPosition: d => [d.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, d.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN], 104вҶ’ getRadius: d => d.duration * PX_PER_DAY / 2, 105вҶ’ getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type] 106вҶ’ }), 107вҶ’ 108вҶ’ new PolygonLayer({ 109вҶ’ id: 'micro', 110вҶ’ visible: zoom >= 2.0, 111вҶ’ data: this.props.visibleTasks, 112вҶ’ getPolygon: d => getTaskPolygon(d), 113вҶ’ getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type], 114вҶ’ pickable: true 115вҶ’ }) 116вҶ’ ]; 117вҶ’ } 118вҶ’} 119вҶ’``` 120вҶ’ 121вҶ’### 4.3 Crossfade Transitions 122вҶ’ 123вҶ’To avoid jarring "pop-in" when switching LOD levels, both layers render simultaneously during transition with opacity crossfade: 124вҶ’ 125вҶ’```typescript 126вҶ’const TRANSITION_WIDTH = 0.1; // Zoom units 127вҶ’ 128вҶ’function calculateOpacity(zoom: number, threshold: number, direction: 'in' | 'out') { 129вҶ’ const t = (zoom - threshold) / TRANSITION_WIDTH; 130вҶ’ const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t)); 131вҶ’ return direction === 'in' ? clamped : 1 - clamped; 132вҶ’} 133вҶ’ 134вҶ’// At zoom 0.45: MACRO 100%, MESO 0% 135вҶ’// At zoom 0.50: MACRO 50%, MESO 50% 136вҶ’// At zoom 0.55: MACRO 0%, MESO 100% 137вҶ’``` 138вҶ’ 139вҶ’--- 140вҶ’ 141вҶ’## 5. Viewport Culling 142вҶ’ 143вҶ’### 5.1 RBush Spatial Index 144вҶ’ 145вҶ’Never render off-screen elements. Use R-tree for O(log n) queries: 146вҶ’ 147вҶ’```typescript 148вҶ’import RBush from 'rbush'; 149вҶ’ 150вҶ’const spatialIndex = new RBush(); 151вҶ’ 152вҶ’// Bulk load on data change 153вҶ’spatialIndex.load(tasks.map(task => ({ 154вҶ’ minX: task.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, 155вҶ’ minY: task.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN, 156вҶ’ maxX: (task.startDay + task.duration) * PX_PER_DAY, 157вҶ’ maxY: (task.trainIndex + 1) * PX_PER_TRAIN, 158вҶ’ task 159вҶ’}))); 160вҶ’ 161вҶ’// Query visible tasks with overscan margin 162вҶ’const visible = spatialIndex.search({ 163вҶ’ minX: viewport.left - OVERSCAN, 164вҶ’ minY: viewport.top - OVERSCAN, 165вҶ’ maxX: viewport.right + OVERSCAN, 166вҶ’ maxY: viewport.bottom + OVERSCAN 167вҶ’}); 168вҶ’``` 169вҶ’ 170вҶ’### 5.2 Performance Targets 171вҶ’ 172вҶ’| Metric | Target | Rationale | 173вҶ’|----------------|---------|-----------------------------| 174вҶ’| Viewport query | < 5ms | 1000 results from 60K items | 175вҶ’| Frame time | < 16ms | 60fps constant | 176вҶ’| LOD transition | < 100ms | No perceptible delay | 177вҶ’| Memory | < 100MB | Mobile device support | 178вҶ’ 179вҶ’--- 180вҶ’ 181вҶ’## 6. Input Handling 182вҶ’ 183вҶ’### 6.1 Cross-Platform Normalization 184вҶ’ 185вҶ’Using `@use-gesture/react` for consistent behavior across devices: 186вҶ’ 187вҶ’```typescript 188вҶ’const bind = useGesture({ 189вҶ’ onPinch: ({ offset: [scale], origin: [ox, oy] }) => { 190вҶ’ zoomAtPoint(scale, ox, oy); 191вҶ’ }, 192вҶ’ onWheel: ({ delta: [dx, dy], ctrlKey }) => { 193вҶ’ if (ctrlKey) return; // Handled by onPinch 194вҶ’ pan(-dx, -dy); 195вҶ’ }, 196вҶ’ onDrag: ({ delta: [dx, dy], velocity }) => { 197вҶ’ pan(dx, dy); 198вҶ’ if (velocity > 0.5) startMomentum(velocity); 199вҶ’ } 200вҶ’}, { 201вҶ’ target: canvasRef, 202вҶ’ eventOptions: { passive: false } 203вҶ’}); 204вҶ’``` 205вҶ’ 206вҶ’### 6.2 Gesture Mapping 207вҶ’ 208вҶ’| Input | Device | Action | 209вҶ’|-------------------|----------------|---------------------| 210вҶ’| Drag | All | Pan canvas | 211вҶ’| Scroll wheel | Mouse | Zoom at cursor | 212вҶ’| Two-finger scroll | Trackpad | Pan canvas | 213вҶ’| Pinch | Trackpad/Touch | Zoom at center | 214вҶ’| Ctrl+Scroll | All | Horizontal pan | 215вҶ’| Shift+Scroll | All | Vertical pan | 216вҶ’| Double-click | All | Zoom in 2x at point | 217вҶ’ 218вҶ’### 6.3 Momentum Physics 219вҶ’ 220вҶ’```typescript 221вҶ’const FRICTION = 0.93; 222вҶ’const MIN_VELOCITY = 0.5; 223вҶ’ 224вҶ’function startMomentum(initialVelocity: Vector2) { 225вҶ’ let velocity = initialVelocity; 226вҶ’ 227вҶ’ function animate() { 228вҶ’ velocity = velocity.multiply(FRICTION); 229вҶ’ pan(velocity.x, velocity.y); 230вҶ’ 231вҶ’ if (velocity.magnitude() > MIN_VELOCITY) { 232вҶ’ requestAnimationFrame(animate); 233вҶ’ } 234вҶ’ } 235вҶ’ 236вҶ’ requestAnimationFrame(animate); 237вҶ’} 238вҶ’``` 239вҶ’ 240вҶ’--- 241вҶ’ 242вҶ’## 7. Visual Design 243вҶ’ 244вҶ’### 7.1 Color Palette 245вҶ’ 246вҶ’| Element | Color | Hex | 247вҶ’|-------------------|------------|-----------| 248вҶ’| Background | Zinc 100 | `#f4f4f5` | 249вҶ’| Task: Maintenance | Blue 700 | `#1d4ed8` | 250вҶ’| Task: Overhaul | Amber 500 | `#f59e0b` | 251вҶ’| Task: Inspection | Gray 500 | `#6b7280` | 252вҶ’| Conflict | Red 500 | `#ef4444` | 253вҶ’| Selection | Cyan 500 | `#06b6d4` | 254вҶ’| Focus | Violet 500 | `#8b5cf6` | 255вҶ’ 256вҶ’### 7.2 Heatmap Gradient (MACRO) 257вҶ’ 258вҶ’```typescript 259вҶ’import { interpolateYlOrRd } from 'd3-scale-chromatic'; 260вҶ’ 261вҶ’// Low density вҶ’ High density 262вҶ’// Yellow (#fff3c4) вҶ’ Orange (#fb923c) вҶ’ Red (#dc2626) 263вҶ’const getHeatmapColor = (density: number) => { 264вҶ’ return interpolateYlOrRd(density); // 0.0 to 1.0 265вҶ’}; 266вҶ’``` 267вҶ’ 268вҶ’### 7.3 Typography 269вҶ’ 270вҶ’| Element | Font | Size | 271вҶ’|----------------|-------------------|---------------| 272вҶ’| Task labels | System sans-serif | 11px | 273вҶ’| Timeline dates | System sans-serif | 12px semibold | 274вҶ’| Train IDs | Monospace | 12px | 275вҶ’| Tooltips | System sans-serif | 13px | 276вҶ’ 277вҶ’--- 278вҶ’ 279вҶ’## 8. Layout Structure 280вҶ’ 281вҶ’``` 282вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 283вҶ’в”Ӯ NAVBAR [Zoom: 1.00x] [MESO] [Reset] в”Ӯ 284вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 285вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ TIMELINE HEADER (adaptive date labels) в”Ӯ 286вҶ’в”Ӯ SIDEBAR в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 287вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 288вҶ’в”Ӯ Train в”Ӯ deck.gl DeckGL в”Ӯ 289вҶ’в”Ӯ IDs в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 290вҶ’в”Ӯ (synced в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ 291вҶ’в”Ӯ scroll) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MACRO] [MESO] [MICRO] Layers в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 292вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ 293вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 294вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [+] Zoom в”Ӯ 295вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MINIMAP] [-] Controls в”Ӯ 296вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 297вҶ’``` 298вҶ’ 299вҶ’### Component Responsibilities 300вҶ’ 301вҶ’| Component | Technology | Function | 302вҶ’|---------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------| 303вҶ’| Navbar | BlueprintJS | Zoom level, LOD badge, reset | 304вҶ’| Sidebar | BlueprintJS Card | Train list, synced with viewport Y | 305вҶ’| Timeline | Custom React | Adaptive date labels (day/week/month/year) | 306вҶ’| Canvas | deck.gl DeckGL | WebGL rendering | 307вҶ’| Minimap | SVG | Bird's eye navigation | 308вҶ’| Zoom Controls | BlueprintJS ButtonGroup | +/- zoom buttons | 309вҶ’ 310вҶ’--- 311вҶ’ 312вҶ’## 9. Interaction States 313вҶ’ 314вҶ’### 9.1 Task States 315вҶ’ 316вҶ’| State | Visual | Trigger | 317вҶ’|----------|-----------------|-------------------| 318вҶ’| Normal | Base color | Default | 319вҶ’| Hover | Brightness +30% | Mouse over | 320вҶ’| Selected | Cyan border | Click | 321вҶ’| Focused | Violet ring | Tab navigation | 322вҶ’| Conflict | Red background | hasConflict: true | 323вҶ’ 324вҶ’### 9.2 Selection Flow 325вҶ’ 326вҶ’``` 327вҶ’Hover (instant) вҶ’ Click (select) вҶ’ Details Panel (slide in) 328вҶ’ вҶ’ Escape (deselect) 329вҶ’``` 330вҶ’ 331вҶ’### 9.3 Keyboard Navigation 332вҶ’ 333вҶ’| Key | Action | 334вҶ’|-------------|---------------------| 335вҶ’| Tab | Focus next task | 336вҶ’| Shift+Tab | Focus previous task | 337вҶ’| Enter/Space | Select focused task | 338вҶ’| Arrow keys | Pan viewport | 339вҶ’| +/- | Zoom in/out | 340вҶ’| Escape | Clear selection | 341вҶ’| Home | Reset view | 342вҶ’ 343вҶ’--- 344вҶ’ 345вҶ’## 10. Accessibility 346вҶ’ 347вҶ’### 10.1 ARIA Implementation 348вҶ’ 349вҶ’```tsx 350вҶ’
355вҶ’ 356вҶ’ 357вҶ’ {/* Live region for announcements */} 358вҶ’
359вҶ’ {announcement} 360вҶ’
361вҶ’
362вҶ’``` 363вҶ’ 364вҶ’### 10.2 Announcements 365вҶ’ 366вҶ’| Event | Announcement | 367вҶ’|-------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------| 368вҶ’| LOD change | "View changed to Strategic heatmap / Tactical blocks / Operational details" | 369вҶ’| Zoom change | "75 percent zoom" (debounced) | 370вҶ’| Task focus | "Maintenance task, Train 15, Day 45, 3 days duration" | 371вҶ’| Selection | "Task selected. Press Escape to deselect." | 372вҶ’ 373вҶ’--- 374вҶ’ 375вҶ’## 11. Data Flow 376вҶ’ 377вҶ’### 11.1 Task Entity 378вҶ’ 379вҶ’```typescript 380вҶ’interface Task { 381вҶ’ id: string; 382вҶ’ trainId: string; 383вҶ’ startDate: string; // ISO 8601 384вҶ’ endDate: string; 385вҶ’ type: 'maintenance' | 'overhaul' | 'inspection'; 386вҶ’ hasConflict: boolean; 387вҶ’} 388вҶ’ 389вҶ’interface TaskRender { 390вҶ’ id: string; 391вҶ’ trainIndex: number; // Y position 392вҶ’ startDay: number; // X position (days since epoch) 393вҶ’ duration: number; // Width in days 394вҶ’ color: [number, number, number, number]; // RGBA 395вҶ’ hasConflict: boolean; 396вҶ’} 397вҶ’``` 398вҶ’ 399вҶ’### 11.2 Viewport State 400вҶ’ 401вҶ’```typescript 402вҶ’interface ViewportState { 403вҶ’ x: number; // Camera X (world units) 404вҶ’ y: number; // Camera Y (world units) 405вҶ’ zoom: number; // 0.1 to 5.0 406вҶ’ lod: 'MACRO' | 'MESO' | 'MICRO'; 407вҶ’} 408вҶ’``` 409вҶ’ 410вҶ’--- 411вҶ’ 412вҶ’## 12. Performance Checklist 413вҶ’ 414вҶ’- [x] deck.gl with GPU instancing (automatic) 415вҶ’- [x] RBush spatial index for O(log n) culling 416вҶ’- [x] Viewport culling with overscan margin 417вҶ’- [x] LOD-based data reduction 418вҶ’- [x] Memoized layer props 419вҶ’- [x] Throttled zoom events (60fps max) 420вҶ’- [x] Crossfade transitions (no pop-in) 421вҶ’- [ ] Web Worker for heavy calculations (future) 422вҶ’- [ ] Progressive loading for large datasets (future) 423вҶ’ 424вҶ’--- 425вҶ’ 426вҶ’## 13. Browser Support 427вҶ’ 428вҶ’| Browser | Support | Notes | 429вҶ’|----------------|---------|----------------------| 430вҶ’| Chrome 90+ | Full | Primary target | 431вҶ’| Safari 15+ | Full | GestureEvent support | 432вҶ’| Firefox 90+ | Full | WebGL2 required | 433вҶ’| Edge 90+ | Full | Chromium-based | 434вҶ’| Mobile Safari | Partial | Touch gestures only | 435вҶ’| Chrome Android | Partial | Touch gestures only | 436вҶ’ 437вҶ’--- 438вҶ’ 439вҶ’## 14. References 440вҶ’ 441вҶ’- [deck.gl Documentation](https://deck.gl/docs) 442вҶ’- [OrthographicView API](https://deck.gl/docs/api-reference/core/orthographic-view) 443вҶ’- [@use-gesture/react](https://use-gesture.netlify.app/) 444вҶ’- [RBush Spatial Index](https://github.com/mourner/rbush) 445вҶ’ Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. # UX Specification: Infinite Canvas for Railway Maintenance Planning ## 1. Vision **"Single Pane of Glass"** вҖ” A continuous, zoomable timeline that unifies 12-year strategic planning down to daily operations without page reloads or tab navigation. **Core Metaphor:** Google Earth for time. Pan through years, zoom into days. Data transforms semantically at each level. --- ## 2. Architecture Overview ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ React Application в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Viewport в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @use-gesture в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @mms/toolkit в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ State в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө Input Handler в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө State Machine в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ LOD Decision Layer в”Ӯ в”Ӯ zoom < 0.5 вҶ’ MACRO в”Ӯ 0.5-2.0 вҶ’ MESO в”Ӯ > 2.0 вҶ’ MICRO в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ HeatmapLayer в”Ӯ ScatterplotLayer в”Ӯ PolygonLayer + HTML в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (aggregated) в”Ӯ (instanced) в”Ӯ (detailed cards) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ RBush Spatial Index (60,000+ tasks) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ deck.gl OrthographicView + WebGL2 Renderer в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### Tech Stack | Layer | Technology | Purpose | |-----------|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------| | Rendering | **deck.gl** + OrthographicView | WebGL2 canvas with GPU instancing | | Input | **@use-gesture/react** | Cross-platform pan/zoom/pinch | | Spatial | **RBush** | O(log n) viewport culling | | State | **@mms/toolkit** | Reactive state machine | | UI | **BlueprintJS 6** | Navbar, cards, controls | --- ## 3. Coordinate System The canvas uses a 2D orthographic coordinate system: | Axis | Represents | Unit | Example | |-------|-------------|------------------|---------------------| | **X** | Time | Days since epoch | Day 0 = Jan 1, 2024 | | **Y** | Train index | Row number | Train 0-49 | ```typescript // World coordinates const PX_PER_DAY = 10; // 1 day = 10 pixels const PX_PER_TRAIN = 24; // 1 train row = 24 pixels // Convert screen to world function screenToWorld(screenX: number, screenY: number, viewport: Viewport) { return { day: (screenX - viewport.x) / (PX_PER_DAY * viewport.zoom), trainIndex: (screenY - viewport.y) / (PX_PER_TRAIN * viewport.zoom) }; } ``` --- ## 4. Semantic Zoom (LOD Layers) ### 4.1 Level of Detail Thresholds | LOD | Zoom Range | Time Visible | Visualization | |-----------|-------------|--------------|-------------------------------| | **MACRO** | < 0.5x | 10-20 years | Aggregated heatmap | | **MESO** | 0.5x - 2.0x | 2-5 years | Task blocks (DNA pattern) | | **MICRO** | > 2.0x | 4-8 weeks | Detailed cards + dependencies | ### 4.2 Layer Implementation ```typescript // deck.gl CompositeLayer with LOD switching class MaintenanceLayer extends CompositeLayer { renderLayers() { const { zoom } = this.context.viewport; return [ new HeatmapLayer({ id: 'macro', visible: zoom < 0.5, data: this.props.aggregatedData, getPosition: d => [d.dayCenter, d.trainCenter], getWeight: d => d.taskCount, colorRange: HEATMAP_COLORS // Yellow вҶ’ Orange вҶ’ Red }), new ScatterplotLayer({ id: 'meso', visible: zoom >= 0.5 && zoom < 2.0, data: this.props.tasks, getPosition: d => [d.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, d.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN], getRadius: d => d.duration * PX_PER_DAY / 2, getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type] }), new PolygonLayer({ id: 'micro', visible: zoom >= 2.0, data: this.props.visibleTasks, getPolygon: d => getTaskPolygon(d), getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type], pickable: true }) ]; } } ``` ### 4.3 Crossfade Transitions To avoid jarring "pop-in" when switching LOD levels, both layers render simultaneously during transition with opacity crossfade: ```typescript const TRANSITION_WIDTH = 0.1; // Zoom units function calculateOpacity(zoom: number, threshold: number, direction: 'in' | 'out') { const t = (zoom - threshold) / TRANSITION_WIDTH; const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t)); return direction === 'in' ? clamped : 1 - clamped; } // At zoom 0.45: MACRO 100%, MESO 0% // At zoom 0.50: MACRO 50%, MESO 50% // At zoom 0.55: MACRO 0%, MESO 100% ``` --- ## 5. Viewport Culling ### 5.1 RBush Spatial Index Never render off-screen elements. Use R-tree for O(log n) queries: ```typescript import RBush from 'rbush'; const spatialIndex = new RBush(); // Bulk load on data change spatialIndex.load(tasks.map(task => ({ minX: task.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, minY: task.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN, maxX: (task.startDay + task.duration) * PX_PER_DAY, maxY: (task.trainIndex + 1) * PX_PER_TRAIN, task }))); // Query visible tasks with overscan margin const visible = spatialIndex.search({ minX: viewport.left - OVERSCAN, minY: viewport.top - OVERSCAN, maxX: viewport.right + OVERSCAN, maxY: viewport.bottom + OVERSCAN }); ``` ### 5.2 Performance Targets | Metric | Target | Rationale | |----------------|---------|-----------------------------| | Viewport query | < 5ms | 1000 results from 60K items | | Frame time | < 16ms | 60fps constant | | LOD transition | < 100ms | No perceptible delay | | Memory | < 100MB | Mobile device support | --- ## 6. Input Handling ### 6.1 Cross-Platform Normalization Using `@use-gesture/react` for consistent behavior across devices: ```typescript const bind = useGesture({ onPinch: ({ offset: [scale], origin: [ox, oy] }) => { zoomAtPoint(scale, ox, oy); }, onWheel: ({ delta: [dx, dy], ctrlKey }) => { if (ctrlKey) return; // Handled by onPinch pan(-dx, -dy); }, onDrag: ({ delta: [dx, dy], velocity }) => { pan(dx, dy); if (velocity > 0.5) startMomentum(velocity); } }, { target: canvasRef, eventOptions: { passive: false } }); ``` ### 6.2 Gesture Mapping | Input | Device | Action | |-------------------|----------------|---------------------| | Drag | All | Pan canvas | | Scroll wheel | Mouse | Zoom at cursor | | Two-finger scroll | Trackpad | Pan canvas | | Pinch | Trackpad/Touch | Zoom at center | | Ctrl+Scroll | All | Horizontal pan | | Shift+Scroll | All | Vertical pan | | Double-click | All | Zoom in 2x at point | ### 6.3 Momentum Physics ```typescript const FRICTION = 0.93; const MIN_VELOCITY = 0.5; function startMomentum(initialVelocity: Vector2) { let velocity = initialVelocity; function animate() { velocity = velocity.multiply(FRICTION); pan(velocity.x, velocity.y); if (velocity.magnitude() > MIN_VELOCITY) { requestAnimationFrame(animate); } } requestAnimationFrame(animate); } ``` --- ## 7. Visual Design ### 7.1 Color Palette | Element | Color | Hex | |-------------------|------------|-----------| | Background | Zinc 100 | `#f4f4f5` | | Task: Maintenance | Blue 700 | `#1d4ed8` | | Task: Overhaul | Amber 500 | `#f59e0b` | | Task: Inspection | Gray 500 | `#6b7280` | | Conflict | Red 500 | `#ef4444` | | Selection | Cyan 500 | `#06b6d4` | | Focus | Violet 500 | `#8b5cf6` | ### 7.2 Heatmap Gradient (MACRO) ```typescript import { interpolateYlOrRd } from 'd3-scale-chromatic'; // Low density вҶ’ High density // Yellow (#fff3c4) вҶ’ Orange (#fb923c) вҶ’ Red (#dc2626) const getHeatmapColor = (density: number) => { return interpolateYlOrRd(density); // 0.0 to 1.0 }; ``` ### 7.3 Typography | Element | Font | Size | |----------------|-------------------|---------------| | Task labels | System sans-serif | 11px | | Timeline dates | System sans-serif | 12px semibold | | Train IDs | Monospace | 12px | | Tooltips | System sans-serif | 13px | --- ## 8. Layout Structure ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ NAVBAR [Zoom: 1.00x] [MESO] [Reset] в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ TIMELINE HEADER (adaptive date labels) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ SIDEBAR в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Train в”Ӯ deck.gl DeckGL в”Ӯ в”Ӯ IDs в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (synced в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ scroll) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MACRO] [MESO] [MICRO] Layers в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [+] Zoom в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MINIMAP] [-] Controls в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### Component Responsibilities | Component | Technology | Function | |---------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------| | Navbar | BlueprintJS | Zoom level, LOD badge, reset | | Sidebar | BlueprintJS Card | Train list, synced with viewport Y | | Timeline | Custom React | Adaptive date labels (day/week/month/year) | | Canvas | deck.gl DeckGL | WebGL rendering | | Minimap | SVG | Bird's eye navigation | | Zoom Controls | BlueprintJS ButtonGroup | +/- zoom buttons | --- ## 9. Interaction States ### 9.1 Task States | State | Visual | Trigger | |----------|-----------------|-------------------| | Normal | Base color | Default | | Hover | Brightness +30% | Mouse over | | Selected | Cyan border | Click | | Focused | Violet ring | Tab navigation | | Conflict | Red background | hasConflict: true | ### 9.2 Selection Flow ``` Hover (instant) вҶ’ Click (select) вҶ’ Details Panel (slide in) вҶ’ Escape (deselect) ``` ### 9.3 Keyboard Navigation | Key | Action | |-------------|---------------------| | Tab | Focus next task | | Shift+Tab | Focus previous task | | Enter/Space | Select focused task | | Arrow keys | Pan viewport | | +/- | Zoom in/out | | Escape | Clear selection | | Home | Reset view | --- ## 10. Accessibility ### 10.1 ARIA Implementation ```tsx
{/* Live region for announcements */}
{announcement}
``` ### 10.2 Announcements | Event | Announcement | |-------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------| | LOD change | "View changed to Strategic heatmap / Tactical blocks / Operational details" | | Zoom change | "75 percent zoom" (debounced) | | Task focus | "Maintenance task, Train 15, Day 45, 3 days duration" | | Selection | "Task selected. Press Escape to deselect." | --- ## 11. Data Flow ### 11.1 Task Entity ```typescript interface Task { id: string; trainId: string; startDate: string; // ISO 8601 endDate: string; type: 'maintenance' | 'overhaul' | 'inspection'; hasConflict: boolean; } interface TaskRender { id: string; trainIndex: number; // Y position startDay: number; // X position (days since epoch) duration: number; // Width in days color: [number, number, number, number]; // RGBA hasConflict: boolean; } ``` ### 11.2 Viewport State ```typescript interface ViewportState { x: number; // Camera X (world units) y: number; // Camera Y (world units) zoom: number; // 0.1 to 5.0 lod: 'MACRO' | 'MESO' | 'MICRO'; } ``` --- ## 12. Performance Checklist - [x] deck.gl with GPU instancing (automatic) - [x] RBush spatial index for O(log n) culling - [x] Viewport culling with overscan margin - [x] LOD-based data reduction - [x] Memoized layer props - [x] Throttled zoom events (60fps max) - [x] Crossfade transitions (no pop-in) - [ ] Web Worker for heavy calculations (future) - [ ] Progressive loading for large datasets (future) --- ## 13. Browser Support | Browser | Support | Notes | |----------------|---------|----------------------| | Chrome 90+ | Full | Primary target | | Safari 15+ | Full | GestureEvent support | | Firefox 90+ | Full | WebGL2 required | | Edge 90+ | Full | Chromium-based | | Mobile Safari | Partial | Touch gestures only | | Chrome Android | Partial | Touch gestures only | --- ## 14. References - [deck.gl Documentation](https://deck.gl/docs) - [OrthographicView API](https://deck.gl/docs/api-reference/core/orthographic-view) - [@use-gesture/react](https://use-gesture.netlify.app/) - [RBush Spatial Index](https://github.com/mourner/rbush)

Executive Summary 22вҶ’ 23вҶ’This document establishes the visual identity, interaction patterns, and technical architecture for the MMS Fractal Canvas interface. The system enables maintenance planners to navigate seamlessly from 12-year strategic views to shift-level execution through semantic zoomвҖ”similar to Google Maps but for time-based maintenance planning. 24вҶ’ 25вҶ’**Core Constraints:** 26вҶ’- React 18+ with TypeScript 27вҶ’- Storybook as development environment 28вҶ’- External state management only (no useState/useReducer) 29вҶ’- Permitted hooks: `useRef`, `useSyncExternalStore`, `useMemo` 30вҶ’- Mature libraries only (8+ years of evolution) 31вҶ’- Preference for deterministic, testable architectures (State Machines) 32вҶ’ 33вҶ’--- 34вҶ’ 35вҶ’## 2. 318вҶ’ 319вҶ’#### Level 1: Strategic (10-12 Years) 320вҶ’ 321вҶ’**Purpose:** Capital planning, fleet lifecycle overview, overhaul clustering 322вҶ’ 323вҶ’**Visual Elements:** 324вҶ’- Heatmap grid: Rows = Train units, Columns = Quarters/Years 325вҶ’- Color intensity = Maintenance cost/hours 326вҶ’- Horizontal threshold lines at 400K/800K/1.2M km 327вҶ’- Major overhaul milestones as prominent blocks 328вҶ’- Fleet segmentation by type (Kinki Sharyo / Alstom) 329вҶ’ 330вҶ’#### Level 2: Tactical (1-3 Years) 331вҶ’ 332вҶ’**Purpose:** Workload balancing, capacity planning, campaign scheduling assignment indicators 349вҶ’- Dependency lines between related tasks 350вҶ’- "Today" vertical line (prominent red dotted) 351вҶ’- Mileage balance bars per train 352вҶ’ 353вҶ’#### Level 4: Execution (1-4 Weeks) 354вҶ’ 355вҶ’**Purpose:** Shift planning, bay assignment, real-time tracking 356вҶ’ 357вҶ’**Visual Elements:** 358вҶ’- Detailed task cards with task name, duration, assigned technicians, Frontend Architecture 498вҶ’ 499вҶ’### 5.1 Core Principles 500вҶ’ 501вҶ’1. **State Outside React**: All application state managed externally 502вҶ’2. **Deterministic Updates**: State transitions via finite state machines 503вҶ’3. **Immutable Data**: All state updates produce new references 504вҶ’4. **Render Performance**: React only handles DOM reconciliation 505вҶ’5. **Testability**: State logic unit-testable without React 506вҶ’ 507вҶ’### 5.2 Allowed React Hooks 508вҶ’ 509вҶ’| Hook | Purpose | Usage | 510вҶ’|------|---------|-------| 511вҶ’| `useRef` | DOM references, mutable values | Canvas refs, animation frames | 512вҶ’| `useSyncExternalStore` | Subscribe to external stores | State machine subscriptions | 513вҶ’| `useMemo` | Derived values from stable inputs | Computed selectors | 514вҶ’| Library hooks | Required by external libraries | deck.gl, XState, etc. | 515вҶ’ 516вҶ’### 5.3 Prohibited Patterns 517вҶ’ 518вҶ’```typescript 519вҶ’// вқҢ PROHIBITED 520вҶ’const [state, setState] = useState(); 521вҶ’const [state, dispatch] = useReducer(); 522вҶ’useEffect(() => { /* side effects */ }, []); 523вҶ’useCallback(() => {}, []); 524вҶ’ 525вҶ’// вң… ALLOWED 526вҶ’const canvasRef = useRef(null); 527вҶ’const state = useSyncExternalStore(store.subscribe, store.getSnapshot); 528вҶ’const derived = useMemo(() => computeExpensive(state), [state]); 529вҶ’``` 530вҶ’ 731вҶ’ "immer": "^10.0.0", 732вҶ’ 733вҶ’ "d3-scale": "^4.0.0", 734вҶ’ "d3-interpolate": "^3.0.0", 735вҶ’ "d3-ease": "^3.0.0", 736вҶ’ "d3-time": "^3.0.0", 737вҶ’ 738вҶ’ "gl-matrix": "^3.4.0", 739вҶ’ "rbush": "^3.0.0", 740вҶ’ 741вҶ’ "lucide-react": "^0.300.0" 742вҶ’ } 743вҶ’} 744вҶ’``` 745вҶ’ 746вҶ’### 7.3 Performance Targets 747вҶ’ 748вҶ’| Metric | Target | Measurement | 749вҶ’|--------|--------|-------------| 750вҶ’| Initial Load | < 2s | First Contentful Paint | 751вҶ’| Zoom Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | 752вҶ’| Pan Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | 753вҶ’| LOD Transition | < 200ms | Complete layer swap | 754вҶ’| Memory (idle) | < 100MB | Chrome DevTools | 755вҶ’| 60K Points Render | 60fps | Chrome Performance panel | 756вҶ’ 757вҶ’### 7.4 Key Implementation Tips 758вҶ’ 759вҶ’1. **During zoom gesture**: Use CSS transform for instant GPU-accelerated feedback 760вҶ’2. **After zoom settles** (debounced 150ms): Redraw canvas with new LOD 761вҶ’3. **LOD transitions**: Crossfade between layers over 200ms 762вҶ’4. **Row virtualization**: Render only visible rows + 5-row buffer 763вҶ’5. **Spatial indexing**: Use Quadtree/R-tree for O(log n) viewport queries 764вҶ’ 765вҶ’--- 766вҶ’ 767вҶ’## Appendix: Image Sources 768вҶ’ 769вҶ’All moodboard images sourced from official vendor websites: 770вҶ’- voestalpine: https://www.voestalpine.com/railway-systems/ 771вҶ’- ZEDAS: https://www.zedas.com/ 772вҶ’- Siemens: https://developer.siemens.com/railigent-x/ 773вҶ’- Alstom: https://www.alstom.com/ 774вҶ’- Prometheus Group: https://www.prometheusgroup.com/ 775вҶ’- Linear: https://linear.app/ 776вҶ’- Grafana: https://grafana.com/ 777вҶ’- DHTMLX: https://dhtmlx.com/ 778вҶ’- deck.gl: https://deck.gl/ 779вҶ’- eMaint: https://www.emaint.com/ 780вҶ’- Asana: https://asana.com/ 781вҶ’- Monday.com: https://monday.com/ 782вҶ’ 783вҶ’--- 784вҶ’ 785вҶ’*Document Version: 1.0* 786вҶ’*Last Updated: December file.content: # MMS UX, Design and Frontend Style Guide **Mileage Management System - Fractal Canvas Interface** **Version:** 1.0 **Date:** December 2025 --- ## Table of Contents 1. [Executive Summary](#1-executive-summary) 2. [Moodboard](#2-moodboard) 3. [UX Specifications](#3-ux-specifications) 4. [Design System](#4-design-system) 5. [Frontend Architecture](#5-frontend-architecture) 6. [Library Comparison Tables](#6-library-comparison-tables) 7. [Final Stack Recommendations](#7-final-stack-recommendations) --- ## 1. Executive Summary This document establishes the visual identity, interaction patterns, and technical architecture for the MMS Fractal Canvas interface. The system enables maintenance planners to navigate seamlessly from 12-year strategic views to shift-level execution through semantic zoomвҖ”similar to Google Maps but for time-based maintenance planning. **Core Constraints:** - React 18+ with TypeScript - Storybook as development environment - External state management only (no useState/useReducer) - Permitted hooks: `useRef`, `useSyncExternalStore`, `useMemo` - Mature libraries only (8+ years of evolution) - Preference for deterministic, testable architectures (State Machines) --- ## 2. Moodboard ### 2.1 Railway Fleet Monitoring Systems #### voestalpine zentrak - Fleet Condition Monitoring (Dark Theme) *Real-time fleet monitoring with ML-powered diagnostics* #### voestalpine zentrak - Alarming & Intervention *Proactive alerts and measurement data visualization* #### voestalpine zentrak - System Supervision *Geographic map with sensor connections and status display* --- ### 2.2 ZEDAS Asset Management #### Wheelset Analyser - Predictive Maintenance *Wheelset wear forecast with timeline visualization* #### Resource Manager - Personnel & Task Planning *Gantt-style resource scheduling interface* #### Invest Manager - Long-term Planning (30 Years) *Investment forecasting and scenario comparison* #### Staff Forecasting *Workforce planning analytics* --- ### 2.3 Siemens Railigent X #### Fleet Analytics Dashboard *Digital transformation for sustainable mobility* #### Maintenance Cost Reduction *15% cost reduction analytics* #### Availability Dashboard *100% availability tracking* --- ### 2.4 Alstom HealthHub #### Condition-Based Maintenance Dashboard *Fleet monitoring with KPIs - 100+ projects, 30% downtime reduction* #### Digital Depot Infographic *Fleet monitoring & management workflow* --- ### 2.5 Prometheus Group GWOS - Maintenance Planning #### Gantt Scheduler *Four-quadrant flexible Gantt architecture* #### Dashboard Overview *Real-time capacity and workload visualization* #### Order Planner *Work order management interface* #### Shift Updater *Resource allocation by shift* #### PM Manager - Preventive Maintenance *Long-term maintenance planning* --- ### 2.6 Modern Dashboard Design - Linear App (Dark Theme) #### Roadmap Timeline *Modern project timeline UI pattern* #### Cycle Analytics *Insights dashboard with KPIs* --- ### 2.7 Grafana - Time Series Dashboards (Dark Theme) #### Full Monitoring Dashboard *Multiple panel types with time-series visualization* #### Kubernetes Capacity *Resource utilization heatmaps* #### Alerting Interface *Alert management and status* --- ### 2.8 DHTMLX Gantt - Professional Gantt Charts #### Full Gantt View with Dependencies #### Resource Management View #### Critical Path Visualization #### Resource Load Diagram #### Theme Options (Including Dark) --- ### 2.9 deck.gl - WebGL Data Visualization #### Screen Grid Layer (Heatmap) *High-performance data density visualization* #### Hexagon Layer (3D Aggregation) #### Heatmap Layer --- ### 2.10 eMaint CMMS #### EAM Dashboard #### Asset Management #### Work Orders --- ### 2.11 Asana - Timeline Views #### Timeline View #### Gantt View --- ### 2.12 Monday.com #### Gantt Chart #### Progress Dashboard --- ### 2.13 Key Visual Themes Summary | Theme | Description | Primary Reference | |-------|-------------|-------------------| | **Industrial Precision** | Clean, technical aesthetic for control rooms | voestalpine zentrak, Grafana | | **Information Density** | Maximum data visibility without clutter | SNCF Fleet Dashboard, Linear | | **Temporal Navigation** | Time as primary navigation axis | Google Maps, DHTMLX Gantt | | **Status at a Glance** | Color-coded health indicators | Prometheus GWOS, Railigent X | | **Progressive Disclosure** | Details emerge on zoom, not click | Mapbox, deck.gl | | **Dark Theme Priority** | Reduced eye strain in control rooms | zentrak, Grafana, Linear | ### 2.14 Anti-Patterns to Avoid | вқҢ Avoid | вң… Prefer | |----------|----------| | 3D effects, gradients on Gantt bars | Flat, monochrome rectangles | | Pure black borders | Slightly darker tone of bar background | | Multiple navigation tabs/pages | Single continuous canvas | | Modal dialogs for details | Inline expansion on zoom | | Skeuomorphic design elements | Clean, functional minimalism | | Bright saturated colors | Muted professional palette | --- ## 3. UX Specifications ### 3.1 Semantic Zoom Architecture The interface operates as a continuous zoomable canvas where zoom level determines content granularity: ``` ZOOM LEVEL TIME SPAN CONTENT DENSITY RENDERING в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Strategic (< 0.3x) в”Ӯ 10-12 years в”Ӯ Aggregated blocks в”Ӯ WebGL в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Mileage thresholds в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Tactical (0.3-1.0x) в”Ӯ 1-3 years в”Ӯ Campaign bars в”Ӯ WebGL/Canvas в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Capacity heatmap в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Operational (1-3x) в”Ӯ 1-6 months в”Ӯ Work orders в”Ӯ Canvas/SVG в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Resource lanes в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Execution (> 3x) в”Ӯ 1-4 weeks в”Ӯ Task details в”Ӯ SVG/HTML в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Bay assignments в”Ӯ ``` ### 3.2 Navigation Patterns #### Primary Navigation (Zoom + Pan) | Action | Input | Result | |--------|-------|--------| | Pan horizontally | Drag / Arrow keys / Shift+Scroll | Move through time | | Pan vertically | Drag / Arrow keys | Move through train units | | Zoom in | Scroll up / Pinch out / `+` key | Increase temporal detail | | Zoom out | Scroll down / Pinch in / `-` key | Decrease temporal detail | | Reset view | `Home` key / Reset button | Return to default strategic view | | Jump to today | `T` key / Today button | Center on current date | ### 3.3 Content by Zoom Level #### Level 1: Strategic (10-12 Years) **Purpose:** Capital planning, fleet lifecycle overview, overhaul clustering **Visual Elements:** - Heatmap grid: Rows = Train units, Columns = Quarters/Years - Color intensity = Maintenance cost/hours - Horizontal threshold lines at 400K/800K/1.2M km - Major overhaul milestones as prominent blocks - Fleet segmentation by type (Kinki Sharyo / Alstom) #### Level 2: Tactical (1-3 Years) **Purpose:** Workload balancing, capacity planning, campaign scheduling **Visual Elements:** - Stacked bars showing PM types (PM1, PM2, PM3, Overhaul) - Depot capacity utilization as background heatmap - Resource allocation bands (man-hours available vs. required) - Budget period markers - Warning indicators for over-capacity periods #### Level 3: Operational (1-6 Months) **Purpose:** Work order management, resource assignment, conflict resolution **Visual Elements:** - Individual work order bars (DNA-like pattern) - Swimlanes per train unit - Resource assignment indicators - Dependency lines between related tasks - "Today" vertical line (prominent red dotted) - Mileage balance bars per train #### Level 4: Execution (1-4 Weeks) **Purpose:** Shift planning, bay assignment, real-time tracking **Visual Elements:** - Detailed task cards with task name, duration, assigned technicians, parts status - Depot bay grid overlay - Shift boundaries clearly marked - Real-time status badges ### 3.4 Layout Structure ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ NAVBAR [Zoom: 1.00x] [LOD] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [вҳ°] MMS Canvas [<< Today >>] [Search] [Filtersв–ј] [вҡҷ] [рҹ‘Ө] в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ TIMELINE HEADER (adaptive granularity) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 2024 в”Ӯ 2025 в”Ӯ 2026 в”Ӯ 2027 в”Ӯ ... в”Ӯ or в”Ӯ Jan в”Ӯ Feb в”Ӯ Mar в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ SIDEBAR в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Train в”Ӯ MAIN CANVAS в”Ӯ в”Ӯ IDs в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (synced в”Ӯ [Strategic | Tactical | Operational | Execution] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ scroll) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Rendered via WebGL/Canvas/SVG в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Filters в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯ в”Ӯ Legend в”Ӯ в”ӮMinimap в”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [+][-] в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳв”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` --- ## 4. Design System ### 4.1 Color Palette #### Primary Colors (Dark Theme - Default) | Token | Hex | RGB | Usage | |-------|-----|-----|-------| | `--bg-primary` | `#0f172a` | 15, 23, 42 | Main background (slate-900) | | `--bg-secondary` | `#1e293b` | 30, 41, 59 | Cards, panels (slate-800) | | `--bg-tertiary` | `#334155` | 51, 65, 85 | Hover states (slate-700) | | `--border-default` | `#475569` | 71, 85, 105 | Borders (slate-600) | | `--text-primary` | `#f1f5f9` | 241, 245, 249 | Primary text (slate-100) | | `--text-secondary` | `#94a3b8` | 148, 163, 184 | Secondary text (slate-400) | | `--text-muted` | `#64748b` | 100, 116, 139 | Muted text (slate-500) | #### Semantic Colors (Status) | Token | Hex | Usage | Visual | |-------|-----|-------|--------| | `--status-healthy` | `#22c55e` | Available, complete, on-track | рҹҹў | | `--status-warning` | `#f59e0b` | Approaching threshold, scheduled | рҹҹЎ | | `--status-critical` | `#ef4444` | Overdue, exceeded, conflict | рҹ”ҙ | | `--status-info` | `#3b82f6` | In-progress, selected, active | рҹ”ө | | `--status-neutral` | `#6b7280` | Unavailable, historical | вҡ« | #### Maintenance Type Colors | Token | Hex | Maintenance Type | |-------|-----|------------------| | `--maint-pm1` | `#60a5fa` | PM1 - Light inspection (blue-400) | | `--maint-pm2` | `#a78bfa` | PM2 - Medium maintenance (violet-400) | | `--maint-pm3` | `#f472b6` | PM3 - Heavy maintenance (pink-400) | | `--maint-overhaul` | `#fb923c` | Overhaul (orange-400) | | `--maint-corrective` | `#f87171` | Corrective/Urgent (red-400) | #### Heatmap Gradient ``` Low utilization вҶ’ Medium вҶ’ High вҶ’ Over capacity #1e3a5f #f59e0b #dc2626 #7f1d1d ``` ### 4.2 Typography #### Font Stack ```css --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace; ``` #### Type Scale | Token | Size | Weight | Usage | |-------|------|--------|-------| | `--text-xs` | 11px | 400 | Labels on Gantt bars | | `--text-sm` | 13px | 400 | Secondary info, timestamps | | `--text-base` | 14px | 400 | Body text, descriptions | | `--text-lg` | 16px | 500 | Section headers | | `--text-xl` | 20px | 600 | Panel titles | | `--text-2xl` | 24px | 700 | Page titles | | `--text-mono` | 12px | 400 | Train IDs, codes, numbers | ### 4.3 Component Specifications #### Gantt Bar Anatomy ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в•ӯ PM2-00456 вҡ пёҸ в”Ӯ вҶҗ Rounded top-left corner в”Ӯ 4.5h в”Ӯ Track 3 в”Ӯ 2 technicians в”Ӯ вҶҗ Info in single line в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ Height: 24px (operational), 16px (tactical), 8px (strategic) Corner radius: 4px top-left only Border: None (use 10% darker background for definition) ``` #### KPI Card Anatomy ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ Fleet Availability в”Ӯ вҶҗ Label (text-sm, text-secondary) в”Ӯ 94.2% в”Ӯ вҶҗ Value (text-2xl, text-primary) в”Ӯ в–І +1.2% vs last month в”Ӯ вҶҗ Delta (text-sm, status-healthy) в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### 4.4 Animation & Motion #### Timing Functions ```css --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); /* Primary for zoom */ --ease-out-cubic: cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1); /* Secondary transitions */ ``` #### Duration Tokens | Token | Duration | Usage | |-------|----------|-------| | `--duration-fast` | 100ms | Micro-interactions | | `--duration-normal` | 200ms | Standard transitions | | `--duration-slow` | 300ms | Complex animations | | `--duration-zoom` | 400ms | Zoom level transitions | --- ## 5. Frontend Architecture ### 5.1 Core Principles 1. **State Outside React**: All application state managed externally 2. **Deterministic Updates**: State transitions via finite state machines 3. **Immutable Data**: All state updates produce new references 4. **Render Performance**: React only handles DOM reconciliation 5. **Testability**: State logic unit-testable without React ### 5.2 Allowed React Hooks | Hook | Purpose | Usage | |------|---------|-------| | `useRef` | DOM references, mutable values | Canvas refs, animation frames | | `useSyncExternalStore` | Subscribe to external stores | State machine subscriptions | | `useMemo` | Derived values from stable inputs | Computed selectors | | Library hooks | Required by external libraries | deck.gl, XState, etc. | ### 5.3 Prohibited Patterns ```typescript // вқҢ PROHIBITED const [state, setState] = useState(); const [state, dispatch] = useReducer(); useEffect(() => { /* side effects */ }, []); useCallback(() => {}, []); // вң… ALLOWED const canvasRef = useRef(null); const state = useSyncExternalStore(store.subscribe, store.getSnapshot); const derived = useMemo(() => computeExpensive(state), [state]); ``` ### 5.4 State Architecture ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ useSyncExternalStore() в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ React Components в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### 5.5 Directory Structure ``` src/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ stores/ # External state management в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ machines/ # XState machine definitions в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ viewport.machine.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ selection.machine.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ scheduler.machine.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/ # Normalized data stores в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ trains.store.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ selectors/ # Memoized derivations в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ visible-tasks.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ renderers/ # Canvas/WebGL rendering logic в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ webgl/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ strategic.renderer.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ canvas/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ operational.renderer.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ svg/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ execution.renderer.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ math/ # Pure mathematical utilities в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ interpolation.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ viewport.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ aggregation.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ interactions/ # Input handling в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ gesture-recognizer.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ keyboard-handler.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/ # React components (thin wrappers) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Canvas/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Sidebar/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Controls/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ stories/ # Storybook stories в””в”Җв”Җ FractalCanvas.stories.tsx ``` --- ## 6. (2010) | ~150KB | вң… Good | react-three-fiber | MIT | | **PixiJS** | 12 years (2013) | ~200KB | вң… Good | @pixi/react | MIT | | **regl** | 8 years (2016) | ~80KB | вң… Excellent | Manual | MIT | MIT | | **Konva** | 10 years (2015) | ~150KB | Good | MIT | | **Native Canvas API** | 20+ years | 0KB | Excellent | N/A | #### Gantt-Specific Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | Features | License | |---------|----------|-------------|----------|---------| | **DHTMLX Gantt** | 15+ years | ~500KB | Enterprise | Commercial | | **Bryntum Gantt** | 10+ years | ~800KB | Enterprise | Commercial | | **frappe-gantt** | 8 years (2017) | ~40KB | Basic | MIT | ### 6.2 State Management Libraries #### State Machine Libraries (Preferred) | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | TypeScript | Devtools | License | |---------|----------|-------------|------------|----------|---------| | **XState v5** | 10 years (2015) | ~40KB | вң… Excellent | вң… Yes | MIT | | **Robot** | 6 years (2019) | | ~15KB | Time/linear scales | BSD-3 | | **d3-interpolate** | 14 years | ~8KB | Smooth zoom | BSD-3 | | **d3-ease** | 14 years | ~3KB | Easing functions | BSD-3 | | **gl-matrix** | 13 years (2012) | ~30KB | Vector/Matrix ops | MIT | | **rbush** | 11 years (2014) | ~8KB | R-tree spatial index | MIT | ### 6.4 Interaction Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | Touch Support | License | |---------|----------|-------------|---------------|---------| | **Hammer.js** | 13 years (2012) | ~20KB | вң… Excellent | MIT | | **Native Pointer Events** | 10+ years | 0KB | вң… Good | N/A | ### 6.5 Comparison Summary #### Rendering Stack Comparison | Approach | Strategic | Tactical | Operational | Execution | Complexity | |----------|-----------|----------|-------------|-----------|------------| | **All WebGL (deck.gl)** | вң… | вң… | вҡ пёҸ | вқҢ | High | | **Hybrid (WebGL + Canvas + SVG)** | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | Medium | | **All Canvas** | вң… | вң… | вҡ пёҸ | вҡ пёҸ | Medium | #### State Management Comparison | Approach | Predictability | Testability | DevTools | Maturity | |----------|----------------|-------------|----------|----------| | **XState (FSM)** | вң… Excellent | вң… Excellent | вң… Yes | 10 years | | **Redux Toolkit** | вң… Good | вң… Good | вң… Yes | 10 years | --- ## 7. Final Stack Recommendations ### 7.1 Recommended Technology Stack #### Rendering Layer | Layer | Technology | Justification | |-------|------------|---------------| | **Strategic (WebGL)** | deck.gl | Native LOD support, 100K+ points, React integration | | **Tactical (WebGL/Canvas)** | deck.gl + Canvas 2D | Transition layer | | **Operational (Canvas)** | Native Canvas 2D API | Performance + interactivity balance | | **Execution (SVG/HTML)** | Native SVG + React | Rich interactivity, accessibility | #### State Management | Concern | Technology | Justification | |---------|------------|---------------| | **View State** | XState v5 | Deterministic, visual devtools, serializable | | **Selection State** | XState v5 | Multi-select as finite states | | **Data Store** | Immer + normalizr pattern | Immutable updates, normalized entities | #### Mathematics | Concern | Technology | Justification | |---------|------------|---------------| | **Scales** | d3-scale | Industry standard | | **Interpolation** | d3-interpolate | Optimal zoom paths | | **Easing** | d3-ease | Standard functions | | **Spatial Index** | rbush | Mature R-tree | | **Matrix Ops** | gl-matrix | WebGL transforms | #### Interactions | Concern | Technology | Justification | |---------|------------|---------------| | **Gestures** | Native Pointer Events | Zero dependency, full control | | **Keyboard** | Native KeyboardEvent | Standard patterns | ### 7.2 Complete Dependency List ```json { "dependencies": { "@deck.gl/core": "^9.0.0", "@deck.gl/layers": "^9.0.0", "@deck.gl/react": "^9.0.0", "xstate": "^5.0.0", "@xstate/react": "^4.0.0", "immer": "^10.0.0", "d3-scale": "^4.0.0", "d3-interpolate": "^3.0.0", "d3-ease": "^3.0.0", "d3-time": "^3.0.0", "gl-matrix": "^3.4.0", "rbush": "^3.0.0", "lucide-react": "^0.300.0" } } ``` ### 7.3 Performance Targets | Metric | Target | Measurement | |--------|--------|-------------| | Initial Load | < 2s | First Contentful Paint | | Zoom Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | | Pan Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | | LOD Transition | < 200ms | Complete layer swap | | Memory (idle) | < 100MB | Chrome DevTools | | 60K Points Render | 60fps | Chrome Performance panel | ### 7.4 Key Implementation Tips 1. **During zoom gesture**: Use CSS transform for instant GPU-accelerated feedback 2. **After zoom settles** (debounced 150ms): Redraw canvas with new LOD 3. **LOD transitions**: Crossfade between layers over 200ms 4. **Row virtualization**: Render only visible rows + 5-row buffer 5. **Spatial indexing**: Use Quadtree/R-tree for O(log n) viewport queries --- ## Appendix: Image Sources All moodboard images sourced from official vendor websites: - voestalpine: https://www.voestalpine.com/railway-systems/ - ZEDAS: https://www.zedas.com/ - Siemens: https://developer.siemens.com/railigent-x/ - Alstom: https://www.alstom.com/ - Prometheus Group: https://www.prometheusgroup.com/ - Linear: https://linear.app/ - Grafana: https://grafana.com/ - DHTMLX: https://dhtmlx.com/ - deck.gl: https://deck.gl/ - eMaint: https://www.emaint.com/ - Asana: https://asana.com/ - Monday.com: https://monday.com/ --- *Document Version: 1.0* *Last Updated: December 2025* *Status: Ready for Implementation*

1вҶ’# MMS Design Specification 2вҶ’ 3вҶ’> **Internal Document** - Implementation guide for the interactive demo with Vite + React 18 + deck.gl 4вҶ’> 5вҶ’> **Source of Truth**: `docs/RFQ.md` only 6вҶ’> 7вҶ’> **Primary Feature**: Planning View with Sandbox Mode (What-If Scenarios) 8вҶ’ 9вҶ’--- 10вҶ’ 11вҶ’## 1. Executive Summary 12вҶ’ 13вҶ’### 1.1 Objective 14вҶ’ 15вҶ’Win the bidding process by demonstrating an exceptional frontend solution that addresses all client pain points from the RFQ. The demo must visually impress while proving we can deliver a production-ready "Single Pane of Glass" for Rolling Stock Maintenance. 16вҶ’ 17вҶ’### 1.2 RFQ Pain Points вҶ’ Our Solutions 18вҶ’ 19вҶ’| # | Client Pain Point (RFQ) | Our Solution | Key Visual Element | 20вҶ’|---|------------------------|--------------|-------------------| 21вҶ’| 1 | No dedicated mileage management tools | Purpose-built mileage dashboard | KPI Cards + Mileage indicators | 22вҶ’| 2 | IBM Maximo only does asset management | Integrated mileage + maintenance planning | Unified Planning View | 23вҶ’| 3 | Manual Excel management | Interactive visual timeline with drag operations | Gantt-style canvas | 24вҶ’| 4 | Folder-driven data storage | Centralized fleet visualization | Sidebar + Fleet grid | 25вҶ’| 5 | Limited maintenance-operations integration | Single pane for both teams | Shared workspace | 26вҶ’| 6 | Non-compliance risk (underrun/overrun) | Visual alerts + compliance indicators | Color-coded tasks + banners | 27вҶ’| 7 | **No predictive simulations** | **Sandbox Mode for what-if scenarios** | **PRIMARY FEATURE** | 28вҶ’| 8 | Insufficient resource visibility | Resource utilization panels | Heatmap + capacity bars | 29вҶ’| 9 | Manual handling delays | Automated scheduling visualization | Smart conflict detection | 30вҶ’ 31вҶ’--- 32вҶ’ 33вҶ’## 2. Design Philosophy 34вҶ’ 35вҶ’### 2.1 Inspiration Attribution 36вҶ’ 37вҶ’We draw from multiple sources, each contributing specific elements: 38вҶ’ 39вҶ’| Source | What We Take | What We DON'T Take | 40вҶ’|--------|--------------|-------------------| 41вҶ’| **Linear App** | Dark mode aesthetic, typography, whitespace, micro-interactions | Sprint/issue tracking patterns (different domain) | 42вҶ’| **JetBrains Fleet Islands UI** | Modular layout, panel separation, information density | IDE-specific features | 43вҶ’| **DHTMLX Gantt** | Timeline visualization, task bars, dependency lines | Light theme default | 44вҶ’| **Railnova Railfleet** | Fleet dashboard patterns, train status indicators | Specific ECM workflows | 45вҶ’| **deck.gl/Kepler.gl** | GPU-accelerated rendering, smooth transitions | Geospatial focus | 46вҶ’ 47вҶ’### 2.2 Core Principles 48вҶ’ 49вҶ’1. **Density with Clarity** (Islands UI) - Pack information without overwhelming 50вҶ’2. **Dark Mode First** (Linear) - Reduce eye strain, modern aesthetic 51вҶ’3. **Modular Panels** (Fleet) - Visually separated functional areas 52вҶ’4. **Direct Manipulation** (Gantt) - Drag to reschedule, resize to extend 53вҶ’5. **GPU Performance** (deck.gl) - 60fps even with 15k+ tasks 54вҶ’ 55вҶ’--- 56вҶ’ 57вҶ’## 3. Moodboard 58вҶ’ 59вҶ’### 3.1 Aesthetic Reference: Linear App 60вҶ’ 61вҶ’The visual "mood" comes from Linear - minimalist, dark, typography-focused. 62вҶ’ 63вҶ’ 64вҶ’ 65вҶ’*Linear: Dark mode default, generous whitespace, bold typography* 66вҶ’ 67вҶ’ 68вҶ’ 69вҶ’*Linear: Multi-layered views with clean tab navigation* 70вҶ’ 71вҶ’### 3.2 Layout Reference: JetBrains Fleet Islands UI 72вҶ’ 73вҶ’Complex information organized into distinct "islands" - perfect for enterprise apps. 74вҶ’ 75вҶ’ 76вҶ’ 77вҶ’*Fleet Islands UI: Modular panels, transparent styling, reduced cognitive load* 78вҶ’ 79вҶ’ 80вҶ’ 81вҶ’*GitKraken: Similar density with clarity approach* 82вҶ’ 83вҶ’### 3.3 Domain Reference: Scheduling Software 84вҶ’ 85вҶ’Gantt chart patterns from scheduling software. 86вҶ’ 87вҶ’ 88вҶ’ 89вҶ’*DHTMLX Gantt: Dark theme, task bars with dependencies, timeline header* 90вҶ’ 91вҶ’### 3.4 Domain Reference: Railway Software 92вҶ’ 93вҶ’Fleet management patterns from railway industry. 94вҶ’ 95вҶ’ 96вҶ’ 97вҶ’*Railfleet: ECM fleet management, maintenance workflows* 98вҶ’ 99вҶ’### 3.5 Rendering Reference: deck.gl 100вҶ’ 101вҶ’GPU-accelerated visualization capabilities. 102вҶ’ 103вҶ’ 104вҶ’ 105вҶ’*Kepler.gl: deck.gl-powered data visualization* 106вҶ’ 107вҶ’ 108вҶ’ 109вҶ’*Flowmap.blue: Timeline-based flow visualization* 110вҶ’ 111вҶ’ 112вҶ’ 113вҶ’*SandDance: Interactive data exploration with smooth transitions* 114вҶ’ 115вҶ’--- 116вҶ’ 117вҶ’## 4. Design System 118вҶ’ 119вҶ’### 4.1 Color Palette (Dark Mode) 120вҶ’ 121вҶ’``` 122вҶ’BACKGROUND (Islands UI inspired) 123вҶ’в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ 124вҶ’bg-canvas: #0A0A0A (Main canvas background) 125вҶ’bg-panel: #141414 (Island panels) 126вҶ’bg-elevated: #1C1C1C (Cards, popovers) 127вҶ’bg-hover: #262626 (Interactive hover) 128вҶ’bg-active: #2A2A2A (Active/selected) 129вҶ’ 130вҶ’BORDERS (Subtle separation) 131вҶ’в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ 132вҶ’border-subtle: #1F1F1F (Panel edges) 133вҶ’border-default: #2E2E2E (Dividers) 134вҶ’border-strong: #404040 (Focus rings) 135вҶ’ 136вҶ’TEXT (High contrast) 137вҶ’в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ 138вҶ’text-primary: #FAFAFA (Headlines) 139вҶ’text-secondary: #A1A1A1 (Body) 140вҶ’text-tertiary: #6B6B6B (Labels) 141вҶ’text-disabled: #404040 (Disabled) 142вҶ’ 143вҶ’SEMANTIC - MAINTENANCE TYPES (From RFQ) # MMS Design Specification > **Internal Document** - Implementation guide for the interactive demo with Vite + React 18 + deck.gl > > **Source of Truth**: `docs/RFQ.md` only > > **Primary Feature**: Planning View with Sandbox Mode (What-If Scenarios) --- ## 1. Executive Summary ### 1.1 Objective Win the bidding process by demonstrating an exceptional frontend solution that addresses all client pain points from the RFQ. The demo must visually impress while proving we can deliver a production-ready "Single Pane of Glass" for Rolling Stock Maintenance. ### 1.2 RFQ Pain Points вҶ’ Our Solutions | # | Client Pain Point (RFQ) | Our Solution | Key Visual Element | |---|------------------------|--------------|-------------------| | 1 | No dedicated mileage management tools | Purpose-built mileage dashboard | KPI Cards + Mileage indicators | | 2 | IBM Maximo only does asset management | Integrated mileage + maintenance planning | Unified Planning View | | 3 | Manual Excel management | Interactive visual timeline with drag operations | Gantt-style canvas | | 4 | Folder-driven data storage | Centralized fleet visualization | Sidebar + Fleet grid | | 5 | Limited maintenance-operations integration | Single pane for both teams | Shared workspace | | 6 | Non-compliance risk (underrun/overrun) | Visual alerts + compliance indicators | Color-coded tasks + banners | | 7 | **No predictive simulations** | **Sandbox Mode for what-if scenarios** | **PRIMARY FEATURE** | | 8 | Insufficient resource visibility | Resource utilization panels | Heatmap + capacity bars | | 9 | Manual handling delays | Automated scheduling visualization | Smart conflict detection | --- ## 2. Design Philosophy ### 2.1 Inspiration Attribution We draw from multiple sources, each contributing specific elements: | Source | What We Take | What We DON'T Take | |--------|--------------|-------------------| | **Linear App** | Dark mode aesthetic, typography, whitespace, micro-interactions | Sprint/issue tracking patterns (different domain) | | **JetBrains Fleet Islands UI** | Modular layout, panel separation, information density | IDE-specific features | | **DHTMLX Gantt** | Timeline visualization, task bars, dependency lines | Light theme default | | **Railnova Railfleet** | Fleet dashboard patterns, train status indicators | Specific ECM workflows | | **deck.gl/Kepler.gl** | GPU-accelerated rendering, smooth transitions | Geospatial focus | ### 2.2 Core Principles 1. **Density with Clarity** (Islands UI) - Pack information without overwhelming 2. **Dark Mode First** (Linear) - Reduce eye strain, modern aesthetic 3. **Modular Panels** (Fleet) - Visually separated functional areas 4. **Direct Manipulation** (Gantt) - Drag to reschedule, resize to extend 5. **GPU Performance** (deck.gl) - 60fps even with 15k+ tasks --- ## 3. Moodboard ### 3.1 Aesthetic Reference: Linear App The visual "mood" comes from Linear - minimalist, dark, typography-focused. *Linear: Dark mode default, generous whitespace, bold typography* *Linear: Multi-layered views with clean tab navigation* ### 3.2 Layout Reference: JetBrains Fleet Islands UI Complex information organized into distinct "islands" - perfect for enterprise apps. *Fleet Islands UI: Modular panels, transparent styling, reduced cognitive load* *GitKraken: Similar density with clarity approach* ### 3.3 Domain Reference: Scheduling Software Gantt chart patterns from scheduling software. *DHTMLX Gantt: Dark theme, task bars with dependencies, timeline header* ### 3.4 Domain Reference: Railway Software Fleet management patterns from railway industry. *Railfleet: ECM fleet management, maintenance workflows* ### 3.5 Rendering Reference: deck.gl GPU-accelerated visualization capabilities. *Kepler.gl: deck.gl-powered data visualization* *Flowmap.blue: Timeline-based flow visualization* *SandDance: Interactive data exploration with smooth transitions* --- ## 4. Design System ### 4.1 Color Palette (Dark Mode) ``` BACKGROUND (Islands UI inspired) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ bg-canvas: #0A0A0A (Main canvas background) bg-panel: #141414 (Island panels) bg-elevated: #1C1C1C (Cards, popovers) bg-hover: #262626 (Interactive hover) bg-active: #2A2A2A (Active/selected) BORDERS (Subtle separation) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ border-subtle: #1F1F1F (Panel edges) border-default: #2E2E2E (Dividers) border-strong: #404040 (Focus rings) TEXT (High contrast) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ text-primary: #FAFAFA (Headlines) text-secondary: #A1A1A1 (Body) text-tertiary: #6B6B6B (Labels) text-disabled: #404040 (Disabled) SEMANTIC - MAINTENANCE TYPES (From RFQ) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ a-check: #10B981 (Green - Quick, 10k km) b-check: #3B82F6 (Blue - Standard, 50k km) c-check: #F59E0B (Amber - Major, 200k km) d-overhaul: #EF4444 (Red - Full, 800k km) SEMANTIC - STATUS в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ success: #10B981 (Compliant) warning: #F59E0B (Approaching limit) danger: #EF4444 (Overrun/conflict) info: #3B82F6 (Informational) HEATMAP GRADIENT (Capacity/Workload) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ low: #FEF3C7 (Yellow-100) medium: #FB923C (Orange-400) high: #DC2626 (Red-600) critical: #7F1D1D (Red-900) SANDBOX MODE ACCENT (Distinct from baseline) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ sandbox-accent: #8B5CF6 (Violet-500) sandbox-bg: #0F0A1A (Violet-tinted canvas) sandbox-border: #6D28D9 (Violet-700) ``` ### 4.2 Typography ``` FONT FAMILY (Fleet-inspired) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ Primary: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif Monospace: JetBrains Mono, monospace (IDs, numbers) SCALE в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ h1: 24px / 600 / -0.02em (Page titles) h2: 18px / 600 / -0.01em (Section headers) h3: 15px / 600 / 0 (Panel titles) body: 13px / 400 / 0 (Default text) caption: 11px / 500 / 0.02em (Labels) mono: 12px / 500 / 0 (Train IDs, dates) ``` ### 4.3 Spacing & Radius ``` SPACING (4px base unit) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ xs: 4px (Tight gaps) sm: 8px (Default gap) md: 12px (Panel padding) lg: 16px (Section gaps) xl: 24px (Major sections) 2xl: 32px (Page margins) RADIUS (Islands UI - subtle rounding) в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ sm: 4px (Buttons, inputs) md: 6px (Cards, panels) lg: 8px (Modals) full: 9999px (Pills, badges) ``` --- ## 5. Application Shell ### 5.1 Layout Structure (Islands UI Pattern) ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ NAVBAR [48px] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Logo в”Ӯ [Planning] [Resources] [Reports] в”Ӯ в—ү LIVE в—Ӣ SANDBOX в”Ӯ User в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ TIMELINE в”Ӯ [160px] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ PLANNING CANVAS в”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (deck.gl) в”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Search... в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Semantic Zoom: MACRO вҶ’ MESO вҶ’ MICRO в”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в–ј Alstom(79) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ ALT-001 в—Ҹ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ ALT-002 в—Ҹ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ MINIMAP в”Ӯв”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ ALT-003 в—җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
