Component Specifications ### 8.1 Task Block (Meso/Micro) ```typescript interface TaskBlockProps { id: string; trainId: string; startDay: number; // Days from timeline start duration: number; // Days type: 'A-Check' | 'B-Check' | 'C-Check' | 'D-Overhaul'; status: 'scheduled' | 'in-progress' | 'completed'; hasConflict: boolean; isModified: boolean; // Sandbox: violet outline manHours: number; track: number; } ``` **Visual States:** | State | Treatment | |-------|-----------| | Default | Solid fill (type color) | | Hover | Brightness +15%, cursor pointer | | Selected | Cyan border (2px) | | Conflict | Red pulsing border | | Modified (Sandbox) | Violet dashed border | ### 8.2 KPI Card ```typescript interface KPICardProps { title: string; value: string | number; unit?: string; delta?: { value: number; direction: 'up' | 'down' | 'neutral'; label?: string; }; status?: 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'; } ``` ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ Fleet Availability в”Ӯ вҶҗ title (text-tertiary, caption) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 98.2% в”Ӯ вҶҗ value (text-primary, h2) в”Ӯ в–І +0.3% vs last month в”Ӯ вҶҗ delta (success/warning/danger) в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### 8.3 Alert Banner ```typescript interface AlertBannerProps { type: 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'; title: string; description?: string; action?: { label: string; onClick: () => void }; dismissible?: boolean; } ``` ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ вҡ пёҸ 3 trains approaching mileage overrun [View вҶ’] [Г—] в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### 8.4 Minimap ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–’в–’в–“в–“в–“в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–’в–’в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–’в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–“в–“в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в–’в–’в–’в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–“в–“в–’в–’в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘ в”Ӯ вҶҗ Viewport rectangle в”Ӯ в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в”Ӯ в”Ӯв–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳв–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 2024 2030 2036 в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` **Size:** 120px Г— 60px **Position:** Bottom-right corner (fixed) **Interaction:** Click to navigate, drag viewport rectangle --- ## 9. Data Structures ### 9.1 Fleet Data (From RFQ) ```typescript // Fleet composition from RFQ const FLEET_CONFIG = { ALSTOM: { count: 79, prefix: 'ALT', depot: 'AL_RASHIDIYA' }, KINKI: { count: 49, prefix: 'KNK', depot: 'JEBEL_ALI' }, total: 128, }; // Contract period from RFQ const CONTRACT = { startYear: 2024, endYear: 2036, // 12 years }; // Maintenance intervals from RFQ const MAINTENANCE_TYPES = { 'A-Check': { intervalKm: 10_000, tolerance: 2_000, days: 1, manHours: 8 }, 'B-Check': { intervalKm: 50_000, tolerance: 5_000, days: 2, manHours: 32 }, 'C-Check': { intervalKm: 200_000, tolerance: 20_000, days: 3, manHours: 160 }, 'D-Overhaul': { intervalKm: 800_000, tolerance: 50_000, days: 20, manHours: 1200 }, }; ``` ### 9.2 Train Entity ```typescript interface Train { id: string; // "ALT-001" or "KNK-001" type: 'ALSTOM' | 'KINKI'; name: string; depot: 'AL_RASHIDIYA' | 'JEBEL_ALI'; currentMileageKm: number; avgDailyMileageKm: number; status: 'operational' | 'maintenance' | 'out-of-service'; lastMaintenanceDate: string; // ISO 8601 nextMaintenanceDue: string; // ISO 8601 } ``` ### 9.3 Task Entity ```typescript interface Task { id: string; trainId: string; startDate: string; // ISO 8601 endDate: string; // ISO 8601 type: 'A-Check' | 'B-Check' | 'C-Check' | 'D-Overhaul'; status: 'scheduled' | 'in-progress' | 'completed' | 'cancelled'; manHours: number; track: number; // 1-5 hasConflict: boolean; conflictReason?: string; dependencies?: string[]; // Task IDs estimatedCost: number; } ``` ### 9.4 Scenario Entity (Sandbox) ```typescript interface Scenario { id: string; name: string; description?: string; createdAt: string; modifiedAt: string; changes: ScenarioChange[]; metrics: { opexDelta: number; // vs baseline overrunRiskCount: number; trackUtilizationDelta: number; }; } interface ScenarioChange { type: 'move' | 'resize' | 'create' | 'delete' | 'modify'; taskId: string; before: Partial | null; after: Partial | null; timestamp: string; } ``` --- ## 10. Interactions & Gestures ### 10.1 Canvas Navigation | Input | Action | Handler | |-------|--------|---------| | Drag | Pan canvas | @use-gesture onDrag | | Scroll wheel | Zoom (cursor-centered) | @use-gesture onWheel | | Pinch (touch) | Zoom | @use-gesture onPinch | | Double-click | Zoom in to point | Custom handler | | Double-tap (touch) | Zoom in to point | Custom handler | ### 10.2 Task Interactions | Input | Live Mode | Sandbox Mode | |-------|-----------|--------------| | Hover | Tooltip | Tooltip + resize handles | | Click | Select task | Select task | | Drag task | - | Move (reschedule) | | Drag edge | - | Resize duration | | Right-click | View menu | Edit menu | | Delete key | - | Delete selected | ### 10.3 Keyboard Shortcuts | Key | Action | |-----|--------| | `+` / `=` | Zoom in | | `-` | Zoom out | | `0` | Reset zoom to 1x | | Arrow keys | Pan canvas | | `Escape` | Clear selection | | `Delete` | Delete task (Sandbox) | | `Ctrl+Z` | Undo (Sandbox) | | `Ctrl+Shift+Z` | Redo (Sandbox) | | `S` | Toggle Sandbox mode | --- ## 11. Performance Targets | Metric | Target | Notes | |--------|--------|-------| | FPS (idle) | вүҘ60 | All LOD levels | | FPS (interaction) | вүҘ30 | During pan/zoom | | Initial load | <3s | First meaningful paint | | Bundle size | <500KB | Gzipped | | Task count | 15,000+ | With viewport culling | | Viewport query | <5ms | RBush R-tree | | Memory | Stable | No leaks in 5min session | --- ## 12. Implementation Stack ``` FRAMEWORK в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ Vite 5.x - Fast HMR, ESM-first build tool React 18.3.1 - UI components (required for BlueprintJS 6) TypeScript 5.x - Type safety VISUALIZATION в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ deck.gl 9.x - WebGL layers OrthographicView - 2D timeline coordinate system @use-gesture/react - Cross-platform input handling RBush - Spatial indexing (viewport culling) STATE MANAGEMENT в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ XState 5.x - Viewport & sandbox state machines Immer - Immutable scenario changes STYLING в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ Tailwind CSS 3.x - Utility-first styling CSS Variables - Design tokens Inter font - Typography ``` --- ## 13. content.text:
Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive view of the design system. Let me compile the report.

## Design System & UX Documentation Exploration Report

### Executive Summary

The MMS-MFC project has **extensive, high-quality design documentation** but the **current implementation significantly lags behind the documented vision**. There is a substantial gap between the enterprise dark-mode "Fractal Canvas" specification and the light-mode traditional dashboard currently deployed.

---

## 1. Current Design State

### Design Documentation Present

The project has three major design documents:

1. **MMS_STYLE_GUIDE.md** (787 lines)
   - Comprehensive moodboard with railway fleet management references (voestalpine zentrak, ZEDAS, Siemens Railigent X, Alstom HealthHub)
   - Detailed color palette for dark theme
   - Typography specifications (Inter sans-serif + JetBrains Mono)
   - Component specifications with visual states
   - Animation and motion design tokens

2. **DESIGN_SPEC.md** (1,507 lines)
   - Full "Single Pane of Glass" vision with semantic zoom
   - Islands UI pattern for layout
   - Sandbox mode specifications (what-if scenario simulation)
   - Phased implementation plan (4 phases: wireframes вҶ’ layout вҶ’ components вҶ’ polish)
   - RFQ requirements mapping

3. **UX_SPECIFICATION.md** (445 lines)
   - Technical architecture for infinite canvas
   - Coordinate system and LOD (Level of Detail) layers
   - deck.gl + RBush performance targeting
   - Input handling and gesture normalization
   - Accessibility requirements

### Current Implementation Reality

**Colors:** Light mode with white/gray backgrounds
- Background: `#ffffff` (white) with gray accents
- Primary: Blue (`#3b82f6`)
- Status: Green, Red, Yellow utilities
- **NOT** the documented dark theme (`#0A0A0A` canvas, `#141414` panels)

**Components:** Traditional card-based dashboard
- KPICard: Light background with left border (implemented)
- Navigation: Light gray header bar with white background (implemented)
- MaintenanceAlerts: White cards with light gray separators (implemented)
- No dark mode toggle or Sandbox mode visible

**Typography:** Standard system fonts
- Actually using system-ui/sans-serif (no custom Inter loading visible)
- Monospace for train IDs is configured but not prominently used

**Layout:** Traditional multi-page app
- Separate routes for Dashboard, Map, Allocation, Fleet, Balancing, Maintenance
- NOT the unified infinite canvas with semantic zoom

---

## 2. Color System Analysis

### Documented Design (Dark Theme)

**Primary Canvas Colors:**
```
bg-canvas:      #0A0A0A (Main background)
bg-panel:       #141414 (Island panels)
bg-elevated:    #1C1C1C (Cards, popovers)
bg-hover:       #262626 (Interactive hover)
text-primary:   #FAFAFA (Headlines)
text-secondary: #A1A1A1 (Body)
```

**Maintenance Type Colors:**
```
PM1:     #10B981 (Green)    - Light inspection (10k km)
PM2:     #3B82F6 (Blue)     - Medium maintenance (50k km)
PM3:     #F59E0B (Amber)    - Heavy maintenance (200k km)
Overhaul: #EF4444 (Red)     - Full service (800k km)
```

**Sandbox Mode (Accent):**
```
sandbox-accent: #8B5CF6 (Violet-500)
sandbox-bg:     #0F0A1A (Violet-tinted)
```

### Current Implementation

**Tailwind Config (tailwind.config.js):**
```javascript
colors: {
  primary: { 50-900: Blue gradient },
  status: {
    available: '#22c55e',    // Green
    inService: '#3b82f6',    // Blue
    maintenance: '#ef4444',  // Red
  },
}
```

**Issues:**
- Light background, not dark
- No sandbox accent colors defined
- No gray/text color tokens for dark theme
- Heatmap gradient not configured

---

## 3. Typography

### Documented System

| Element | Font | Size | Weight |
|---------|------|------|--------|
| Page titles (h1) | Inter | 24px | 600 |
| Section headers (h2) | Inter | 18px | 600 |
| Panel titles (h3) | Inter | 15px | 600 |
| Body | Inter | 13px | 400 |
| Labels (caption) | Inter | 11px | 500 |
| Train IDs (mono) | JetBrains Mono | 12px | 500 |

### Current Implementation

**In globals.css:**
```css
.train-id { font-family: 'Monaco', 'Menlo', 'Courier New', monospace; }
.km-value { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
```

**Issues:**
- No custom font loading visible (should import Inter)
- No type scale tokens in Tailwind
- Monaco instead of JetBrains Mono
- No heading utility classes for typography hierarchy

---

## 4. Component Specifications Gap

### Documented (From DESIGN_SPEC.md)

**KPI Card Anatomy:**
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Fleet Availability         в”Ӯ  вҶҗ Label (text-sm, text-secondary)
в”Ӯ  94.2%                      в”Ӯ  вҶҗ Value (text-2xl, text-primary)
в”Ӯ  в–І +1.2% vs last month      в”Ӯ  вҶҗ Delta (text-sm, status-healthy)
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
- Dark background (#141414)
- Rounded 6px corners
- Subtle border
- Delta indicators with direction arrows

**Task Block (Gantt):**
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ в•ӯ PM2-00456                                вҡ пёҸ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   4.5h  в”Ӯ  Track 3  в”Ӯ  2 technicians          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
- Height: 24px (operational), 16px (tactical), 8px (strategic)
- Top-left corner radius only
- Status indicators
- Conflict warnings

### Current Implementation

**KPICard.tsx:**
```tsx
className={`bg-white shadow rounded-lg p-4 border-l-4 ${borderColor} ...`}
```
- White background (not dark)
- All corners rounded equally
- No delta indicator pattern
- Simple left border

---

## 5. Layout Architecture Gap

### Documented (Islands UI Pattern)

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  NAVBAR                                    [Zoom][LOD][Reset]в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  TIMELINE HEADER (adaptive granularity)        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  SIDEBAR   в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  (Fleet)   в”Ӯ                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [160px]   в”Ӯ       PLANNING CANVAS (deck.gl)                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ    WebGL rendering: MACRO/MESO/MICRO LOD       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ                                          Minimapв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ                                            [+][-]в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  STATUS ISLAND                         [Zoom: 1.25x][View]  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Key Features:**
- Single unified canvas (not multi-page)
- Sidebar with train list synced to canvas Y scroll
- Adaptive timeline header with zoom-based granularity
- Minimap in corner
- deck.gl WebGL rendering with 3 LOD levels

### Current Implementation

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Navbar: [Dashboard][Map][Allocation]в”Ӯ  вҶҗ Traditional tabs
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  [Dashboard Page]                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - 4 KPI Cards                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Maintenance Alerts                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Other cards                        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Issues:**
- Multi-page app (separate routes)
- No unified canvas
- No semantic zoom
- No deck.gl WebGL visualization
- No sidebar with fleet list
- No minimap

---

## 6. Visual Styling Issues

### What's Documented (Enterprise Dark Mode Look)

1. **Dark theme by default** for reduced eye strain
2. **Consistent 4px spacing grid** (xs: 4px, sm: 8px, md: 12px, lg: 16px, xl: 24px, 2xl: 32px)
3. **Subtle borders** using darker tone (not pure black)
4. **Monochrome task bars** (flat, no gradients)
5. **High contrast text** on dark backgrounds
6. **Smooth transitions** (200-300ms easing)
7. **Rounded corners 4-8px** (subtle, not heavy)

### Current Implementation

1. **Light theme** (white backgrounds)
2. **Tailwind default spacing** (likely standard)
3. **Simple shadows and borders**
4. **No design token system**
5. **Basic text colors**
6. **No motion/animation tokens**
7. **Standard Tailwind rounding**

---

## 7. Missing Advanced Features

### Documented But Not Implemented

**Sandbox Mode (PRIMARY FEATURE)**
- What-if scenario simulation
- Toggle between LIVE and SANDBOX modes
- Visual differentiation (violet accent in sandbox)
- Change tracking and undo/redo
- Scenario comparison views
- Impact metrics (OPEX delta, overrun risk, track utilization)

**Semantic Zoom (Core Feature)**
- 4 LOD levels:
  - MACRO (< 0.5x): 10-12 year heatmap
  - MESO (0.5x-2.0x): 1-3 year task blocks
  - MICRO (> 2.0x): 1-6 week operational details
- Crossfade transitions between LOD levels
- Zoom at cursor point (not fixed)

**Advanced Interactions**
- Gesture support (pinch, drag, scroll)
- Momentum scrolling
- Keyboard shortcuts (arrow keys, +/-, Home, S for Sandbox)
- Direct task manipulation (drag to reschedule, resize to extend)

---

## 8. Specific Areas Needing Work

### Priority 1: Dark Theme Implementation

**Files to update:**
1. `tailwind.config.js` - Add comprehensive color tokens
2. `globals.css` - Add CSS variables for dark mode
3. All component files - Apply dark theme classes

**Color changes needed:**
```css
/* OLD */
className="bg-white shadow..."

/* NEW */
className="bg-neutral-900 dark:bg-neutral-950 shadow-dark..."
```

### Priority 2: Typography System

**Files to update:**
1. `app/layout.tsx` - Import Inter font
2. `globals.css` - Define type scale utilities
3. `tailwind.config.js` - Add font family config

```css
/* NEW */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@500&display=swap');

:root {
  --font-sans: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}
```

### Priority 3: Component Refinement

**KPICard enhancements:**
- Dark background (#141414)
- Optional delta indicator with direction
- Status colors for warnings
- Proper spacing and typography

**Alert/Status components:**
- Dark card styling
- Proper contrast ratios
- Icon and text alignment

### Priority 4: Architecture (Long-term)

**Major refactoring needed for:**
- Unified canvas architecture
- deck.gl WebGL integration
- RBush spatial indexing
- Semantic zoom system
- Sandbox mode state management
- Multi-LOD rendering layers

---

## 9. Gap Summary Table

| Aspect | Documented | Current | Gap |
|--------|-----------|---------|-----|
| **Theme** | Dark (#0A0A0A) | Light (#fff) | Complete |
| **Typography** | Inter + system font hierarchy | Basic system fonts | Partial |
| **Color System** | 8-color palette + maintenance types | Limited palette | Significant |
| **Layout** | Islands UI + unified canvas | Multi-page traditional | Complete |
| **LOD/Zoom** | 4-level semantic zoom | Single view only | Complete |
| **Sandbox Mode** | Full what-if simulation | Not present | Complete |
| **Visualization** | deck.gl WebGL + heatmaps | Basic React components | Complete |
| **Interactions** | Gestures + direct manipulation | Standard click/nav only | Significant |
| **Animation** | 200-300ms easing + motion tokens | Basic transitions | Partial |
| **Accessibility** | ARIA + keyboard nav | Present but minimal | Partial |

---

## 10. Recommendations

### Quick Wins (1-2 days)

1. Implement dark theme in Tailwind config
2. Add Inter font import
3. Create design token CSS variables
4. Update KPICard to dark styling
5. Update all components to use dark theme

### Medium-term (1-2 weeks)

1. Refactor layout to Islands UI pattern
2. Implement mode toggle (LIVE/SANDBOX)
3. Add Sandbox panel UI (static first)
4. Create component library in Storybook
5. Implement gesture handling (@use-gesture/react)

### Long-term (4-8 weeks)

1. Integrate deck.gl for WebGL rendering
2. Implement semantic zoom with 4 LOD levels
3. Add RBush spatial indexing for performance
4. Complete Sandbox mode with state management
5. Full animation and motion design polish

---

## Files Referenced

- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/docs/MMS_STYLE_GUIDE.md` (787 lines)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/docs/DESIGN_SPEC.md` (1,507 lines)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/docs/design/UX_SPECIFICATION.md` (445 lines)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/apps/web/tailwind.config.js` (38 lines)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/apps/web/src/app/globals.css` (33 lines)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/apps/web/src/components/dashboard/KPICard.tsx` (59 lines)
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/apps/web/src/components/layout/Navigation.tsx` (71 lines)

---

**Conclusion:** The design system documentation is **excellent and comprehensive**, but the current implementation is a **traditional light-mode dashboard** that doesn't reflect the ambitious "Enterprise Dark Mode with Semantic Zoom" vision. Substantial work is needed to close this gap, but the design direction is clear and well-documented.
